title: CoBA: Integrated Deep Learning Model for Reliable Low-Altitude UAV Classification in mmWave Radio Networks
summary: Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly used in civilian and industrial applications, making secure low-altitude operations crucial. In dense mmWave environments, accurately classifying low-altitude UAVs as either inside authorized or restricted airspaces remains challenging, requiring models that handle complex propagation and signal variability. This paper proposes a deep learning model, referred to as CoBA, which stands for integrated Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (BiLSTM), and Attention which leverages Fifth Generation (5G) millimeter-wave (mmWave) radio measurements to classify UAV operations in authorized and restricted airspaces at low altitude. The proposed CoBA model integrates convolutional, bidirectional recurrent, and attention layers to capture both spatial and temporal patterns in UAV radio measurements. To validate the model, a dedicated dataset is collected using the 5G mmWave network at TalTech, with controlled low altitude UAV flights in authorized and restricted scenarios. The model is evaluated against conventional ML models and a fingerprinting-based benchmark. Experimental results show that CoBA achieves superior accuracy, significantly outperforming all baseline models and demonstrating its potential for reliable and regulated UAV airspace monitoring.
tldr: The paper introduces CoBA, a deep learning model using CNN, BiLSTM, and Attention mechanisms on 5G mmWave radio measurements for classifying UAVs in authorized and restricted low-altitude airspaces, showing superior accuracy compared to baselines.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为CoBA的深度学习模型，该模型利用CNN、BiLSTM和注意力机制处理5G毫米波无线电测量数据，用于分类授权和限制低空空域中的无人机，并且与基线模型相比表现出更高的准确性。
summary_zh: 无人驾驶飞行器（UAV）在民用和工业领域的应用日益广泛，安全低空作业至关重要。在密集的毫米波环境下，准确分类低空无人机是否位于授权或禁飞空域仍然具有挑战性，需要能够处理复杂传播和信号变化的模型。本文提出了一种深度学习模型CoBA，它是集成的卷积神经网络（CNN）、双向长短期记忆网络（BiLSTM）和注意力机制的缩写，利用第五代（5G）毫米波（mmWave）无线电测量数据来分类低空无人机在授权和禁飞空域的作业。所提出的CoBA模型集成了卷积层、双向循环层和注意力层，以捕获无人机无线电测量数据中的空间和时间模式。为了验证该模型，使用塔林理工大学的5G毫米波网络收集了一个专用数据集，其中包括在授权和禁飞场景下进行的受控低空无人机飞行。该模型与传统的机器学习模型和基于指纹识别的基准进行了评估。实验结果表明，CoBA实现了卓越的准确率，显著优于所有基准模型，并证明了其在可靠和规范的无人机空域监测方面的潜力。

title: Generative Latent Alignment for Interpretable Radar Based Occupancy Detection in Ambient Assisted Living
summary: In this work, we study how to make mmWave radar presence detection more interpretable for Ambient Assisted Living (AAL) settings, where camera-based sensing raises privacy concerns. We propose a Generative Latent Alignment (GLA) framework that combines a lightweight convolutional variational autoencoder with a frozen CLIP text encoder to learn a low-dimensional latent representation of radar Range-Angle (RA) heatmaps. The latent space is softly aligned with two semantic anchors corresponding to "empty room" and "person present", and Grad-CAM is applied in this aligned latent space to visualize which spatial regions support each presence decision. On our mmWave radar dataset, we qualitatively observe that the "person present" class produces compact Grad-CAM blobs that coincide with strong RA returns, whereas "empty room" samples yield diffuse or no evidence. We also conduct an ablation study using unrelated text prompts, which degrades both reconstruction and localization, suggesting that radar-specific anchors are important for meaningful explanations in this setting.
tldr: The paper introduces a Generative Latent Alignment (GLA) framework to improve the interpretability of mmWave radar presence detection in AAL settings by learning a latent representation of radar data aligned with semantic anchors and visualizing presence decisions using Grad-CAM in this latent space.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种生成潜在对齐（GLA）框架，通过学习与语义锚点对齐的雷达数据潜在表示，并在该潜在空间中使用Grad-CAM可视化存在决策，从而提高AAL环境中毫米波雷达存在检测的可解释性。
summary_zh: 本文研究如何在环境辅助生活(AAL)场景中，使毫米波雷达存在检测更具可解释性，因为在这些场景下，基于摄像头的传感会引发隐私问题。我们提出了一种生成式潜在对齐(GLA)框架，该框架将轻量级卷积变分自编码器与冻结的CLIP文本编码器相结合，以学习雷达距离-角度(RA)热图的低维潜在表示。该潜在空间与对应于“空房间”和“有人存在”这两个语义锚点进行软对齐，并在该对齐的潜在空间中应用Grad-CAM来可视化哪些空间区域支持每个存在判断。在我们的毫米波雷达数据集上，我们定性地观察到“有人存在”类别产生紧凑的Grad-CAM斑点，这些斑点与强的RA反射相一致，而“空房间”样本产生弥散或无证据。我们还进行了一项消融研究，使用不相关的文本提示会降低重建和定位性能，表明雷达特定的锚点对于在此设置中进行有意义的解释至关重要。
